channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid draw 4-4 in thrilling 1st leg of Copa del Rey semifinals
item.description: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid both rallied from two goals down in a frantic 4-4 draw in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Tales Azzoni, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chelsea routs Southampton 4-0 on frustrating night for Cole Palmer. Brighton and Palace win
item.description: Chelsea wasn't so reliant on Cole Palmer this time. On a frustrating evening for the England star, his Chelsea teammates stepped up — as demanded by their manager — to share the goals in a 4-0 thrashing of last-place Southampton in the Premier League on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Netflix's 'Full Swing' captures inside look at Scottie Scheffler's arrest before PGA Championship
item.description: Scottie Scheffler's arrest before his second round at the PGA Championship was featured on Netflix's "Full Swing" with never-before-seen footage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushes back against proposal to ban the tush push
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushed back against the Green Bay Packers' proposal to ban the tush push. “I’ve seen some of the stuff that it’s an automatic play,” Sirianni said Tuesday at the NFL's scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CFP commissioners meet after SEC and Big Ten leaders urge them to change seeding
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — All of the commissioners who are part of the College Football Playoff were meeting Tuesday, a week after the SEC and Big Ten commissioners came out of a meeting with their athletic directors in favor of seeding changes.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tar Heels' Davis gets 2-year extension through 2030, hires agent Jim Tanner as GM
item.description: North Carolina coach Hubert Davis has another two years on his deal and a new general manager to help the blueblood men’s basketball program deal with the changing landscape of college athletics. Davis has signed a two-year extension running through the 2029-30 season to lead his alma mater.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dawn of the Warriors’ dynasty: How Steve Kerr built a new culture
item.description: Steve Kerr borrowed from mentor Phil Jackson and friend Pete Carroll to shape the Warriors' first title team.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: 28-year-old freshman at MiraCosta makes name as hoops star
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) — It might not look like it, but Ramel Bethea is old for a freshman — 28 years old to be exact. “Yea the age crazy," said Bethea, who is playing his first season of college basketball at MiraCosta College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Eddie Hill, former Dolphins and Rams running back, dead at 67
item.description: Eddie Hill, a former NFL running back who played for the Los Angeles Rams and Miami Dolphins, has died, one of his former teams said. He was 67.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The 2-point shot is less and less utilized in the NBA. The debate about whether that's good rages on
item.description: The NBA is on the cusp of accomplishing something that it hasn't seen before. The jury's still out on whether it's a good thing. With about seven weeks left in the season, 2-point shots are accounting for 49% of scoring.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas is No. 1 in women's AP Top 25 for the first time in 21 years; NC State climbs into top 10
item.description: Texas is No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll for the first time in 21 years and became the third different team to hold the top spot in the past three weeks. The Longhorns moved atop the poll Monday after previous No. 1 Notre Dame lost in double overtime to N.C.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Morrissey, Scheifele rally Jets to 2-1 overtime win over Sharks for 10th straight
item.description: WINNIPEG, Manitoba (AP) — Josh Morrissey scored the tying goal in the final minute of regulation and Mark Scheifele got the winner 1:33 into overtime as the Winnipeg Jets rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 2-1 on Monday night for their franchise-record 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos assistant coach Michael Wilhoite arrested after being accused of punching a police officer
item.description: DENVER (AP) — An assistant coach for the Denver Broncos is facing a felony assault charge after being accused of punching a police officer in the face at Denver International Airport.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Guardians owner Larry Dolan, Cleveland native, dead at 94
item.description: Larry Dolan, the lifelong Clevelander who purchased the Guardians in 2000, has died at 94, the team announced on Monday. Dolan is the longest-tenured owner in team history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka Doncic's new Lakers teammates say he's ready to face the Mavericks 3 weeks after the trade
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Just over three weeks after the trade that stunned the sports world, Luka Doncic and his Los Angeles Lakers will host the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn atop AP Top 25 for 7th straight week; preseason No. 1 KU out, ending ranked run at 80 weeks
item.description: Auburn remained atop the AP Top 25 for the seventh straight week on Monday, while preseason No. 1 Kansas dropped out of the men's basketball poll for the first time in nearly four years, ending the Jayhawks' ranked run at 80 consecutive weeks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Hunter's possible double duty gives the NFL's annual scouting combine a different look
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Travis Hunter will arrive at the NFL's annual scouting combine listed as a cornerback. By the end of this week, he could be so much more.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robertson scores 2 goals in the 2nd period as the Maple Leafs beat the Blackhawks 5-2
item.description: Nicholas Robertson scored twice in the second period as the Toronto Maple Leafs beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State blasts San Jose State, 105-57
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team got back on track following Sunday's heartbreaking loss to New Mexico with a resounding beatdown over San Jose State Wednesday night, 105-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
